title: Intelligent Textbook Book Metrics
description: Canonical, machine-generated quantitative metrics for an intelligent textbook. Written and overwritten on every run by src/book-metrics/book-metrics.py to docs/learning-graph/book-metrics.json. This file is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for book-wide totals: consuming skills (readme-generator, linkedin-announcement-generator, case-study-generator, book-status reports) READ this file rather than re-deriving counts. It holds numbers and provenance only - descriptive/author fields (title, creator, license, cover image, repository URL) live in book-metadata.json and must not be duplicated here.

$schema.description: Optional pointer back to this schema for editor validation.

metricsVersion.description: Semantic version of the book-metrics.json file format (not the generator version). Bumped only on a breaking change to this schema.

metricsGeneratedBy.description: Human-readable provenance string identifying the program and version that produced this file.

metricsGeneratedOn.description: Human-readable timestamp of the generation run (for display in reports and READMEs).

metricsGeneratedOnISO.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the generation run, for machine comparison and staleness checks.

metrics.description: Book-wide totals. Per-chapter breakdowns are intentionally excluded - those live only in chapter-metrics.md. Any additional key not listed below must be a non-negative integer count (the format is forward-compatible with new count metrics).

additionalProperties.description: Forward-compatibility: any unrecognized metric must be a non-negative integer count.

concepts.description: Concept rows in docs/learning-graph/learning-graph.csv (excluding the header).

chapters.description: Numbered chapter directories under docs/chapters/ that contain an index.md.

microsims.description: MicroSim directories under docs/sims/ that contain an index.md.

stories.description: Story directories under docs/stories/ that contain an index.md.

quizQuestions.description: Total quiz questions across all chapter quiz.md files.

chapterQuizzes.description: Number of chapters that have a quiz.md file.

chapterReferences.description: Number of chapters that have a references.md file.

references.description: Total reference entries across all chapter references.md files.

diagrams.description: H4 headers starting with '#### Diagram:' in student-facing markdown.

equations.description: LaTeX expressions using $ and $$ delimiters in student-facing markdown.

words.description: Total words across student-facing markdown, excluding code blocks and URLs.

developmentStage.description: Publication stage from mkdocs.yml extra.development_stage or course-description.md front matter. Free text; 'Not specified' when absent.

speciesCards.description: Botany books only (docs/plants/ present): total species cards.

speciesCardsWithIllustration.description: Botany books only: species cards that include an illustration.

speciesCardsWithPhotos.description: Botany books only: species cards that include photographs.

speciesCardsWithQuickFacts.description: Botany books only: species cards that include a quick-facts table.
